text: I feel a peculiar sense of displacement, as though the world around me has shifted off-axis. In the quiet, sterile corridor of the first image, the muted atmosphere and absence of others heightens my awareness of space and solitude. Walking into the vibrant, idea-rich space in the second image, I sense a contrast—here, curiosity and inquiry invite me in. The words on the wall tap into my desire for meaning and connection, particularly around how humans relate to technology. My thoughts drift: How often does innovation emerge from moments of interruption, technical failure, and adaptation, just like now?
